sample_sentences: We are a crowd of steamship passengers, and we have been to Europe and the Holy Land.
We have returned, our heads filled with pleasant memories of the journey, and our pockets filled with unpaid bills.
The Azores are a group of nine volcanic islands scattered about in the mid-Atlantic Ocean.
They are a possession of Portugal, and they are so far from that country that they always seem to be in another world.
One of them was covered, from the water's edge to the mountain summit, with a dense green forest.
